block with real content, then run the usual draft-first workflow (branch, PR, preview, deploy). Banned-words list is enforced in CI. When in doubt, run locally: python scripts/tone_guard.py --files-from --> <!-- FILL IN: e.g. Neutropenic Sepsis — Mohsin Haematology Academy -->
Home Guidelines Education Journal Club About Open HaemCalc

v1.0 · Updated · Author: Dr Muhammad Mohsin, Consultant Haematologist

1. Input

2. Output

3. Interpretation

4. Suggested Action

This tool supports, not replaces, clinical judgement. Local policies take precedence.

Red flags — escalate immediately

5. Guideline Basis

How to cite this page

APA: Mohsin M. (). . Mohsin Haematology Academy. https://mohsinhaemacademy.com/guidelines//

Vancouver: Mohsin M. . Mohsin Haematology Academy; . Available from: https://mohsinhaemacademy.com/guidelines//

BibTeX 
@misc{mohsin__,
  author = {Mohsin, Muhammad},
  title  = {},
  year   = {},
  url    = {https://mohsinhaemacademy.com/guidelines//},
  note   = {Mohsin Haematology Academy}
}

Suggest an improvement

Spotted an error, out-of-date reference, or unclear step? Email Dr Mohsin .
